title: Stripe launches biometric one-tap checkout for mobile merchants
snippet: Stripe launched a biometric one-tap checkout flow for mobile merchants, combining saved cards, wallet tokens and risk checks inside a single payment step.
full_text: Stripe launched a biometric one-tap checkout flow for mobile merchants. The company says the new flow combines saved cards, wallet tokens and risk checks inside a single payment step. Merchants can turn it on from the checkout settings, and early pilots focused on reducing abandoned baskets on phones. The product is available first in the United States and the United Kingdom. Banks can benchmark the flow against their own card-on-file, wallet and merchant acquiring journeys because it changes the payment confirmation step rather than only the visual design.
markdown: Stripe launched a biometric one-tap checkout flow for mobile merchants.

title: Finextra: Stripe adds biometric checkout for mobile-first merchants
snippet: According to Stripe, the new mobile checkout uses biometric confirmation, saved cards and wallet tokens to shorten payment completion.
full_text: According to Stripe, the company has introduced a mobile checkout update that uses biometric confirmation, saved cards and wallet tokens to shorten payment completion. The media report repeats Stripe's statement that merchants can enable the flow from checkout settings and that pilots targeted abandoned baskets on phones. The product matters for payment providers because it moves authentication and payment confirmation into one step.
markdown: According to Stripe, the company has introduced a mobile checkout update.

title: Visa and Shopify launch embedded working-capital wallet for SMEs
snippet: Visa and Shopify launched an embedded wallet that lets eligible small businesses receive sales proceeds, pay suppliers and request working-capital offers from the Shopify admin.
full_text: Visa and Shopify launched an embedded wallet for small businesses that sell through Shopify. Eligible merchants can receive card sales proceeds into the wallet, pay suppliers with a virtual Visa credential and request working-capital offers from the same admin screen. Visa said the partnership changes the daily cash-flow workflow for SMEs by placing payments, card issuing and financing in the merchant platform. The first rollout covers US merchants, with additional markets planned after compliance review.
markdown: Visa and Shopify launched an embedded wallet for small businesses.

title: Shopify merchants get Visa wallet and supplier payment tools
snippet: Reported by Visa and Shopify, the embedded wallet gives merchants supplier payments, virtual card credentials and working-capital offers in one dashboard.
full_text: Reported by Visa and Shopify, the embedded wallet gives small merchants supplier payments, virtual card credentials and working-capital offers in one dashboard. The article summarizes the official launch and notes that the scenario connects merchant acquiring, card issuing and lending offers inside a commerce platform. It is a media recap of the same Visa and Shopify event.
markdown: Reported by Visa and Shopify, the embedded wallet gives small merchants supplier payments.

title: UK FCA sets new consumer-consent rules for open banking payments
snippet: The FCA published rules requiring clearer consent screens, payment status messages and revocation options for open banking payments.
full_text: The FCA published new rules for open banking payments. Providers must show clearer consent screens, give users payment status messages and provide a simple revocation option for recurring account-to-account payments. The regulator said banks and payment initiation service providers must update customer journeys before the November compliance date. The rule affects authentication, consent storage and dispute handling in open banking payment flows.
markdown: The FCA published new rules for open banking payments.
